summary: The battlefield is over. Now the real fight begins — against a system that rewards cowards and punishes heroes. The brothers are stripped of rank, loyal ministers are put to death, and a butcher who stumbled into supreme power prepares to open a door he can never close.
source_title: Zhang Fei Beats the Inspector; He Jin Plots Against the Eunuchs

global_arc.start: The three brothers leave Dong Zhuo and rejoin the campaign. The Yellow Turban rebellion enters its final chapter.
global_arc.end: He Jin, frozen by indecision, lets Yuan Shao talk him into summoning warlords to the capital. Cao Cao watches and laughs. The door to catastrophe swings open.
global_arc.core_change: Battlefield heroes cannot survive in peacetime office. Meanwhile, a slaughterhouse butcher holds the fate of the dynasty in his hands and cannot decide whether to swing the blade.
global_arc.chapter_drive: Two parallel failures — a hero stripped of credit, an empire stripped of reason. Personal fate mirrors dynastic fate, and both curves point down.
